wall_4x8_2x6_16oc.notes: 5 studs (2 end + 3 interior at 16" OC), 2 plates (top+bottom), 1 OSB sheet. Edge nailing 6" OC on perimeter studs/plates, center nailing 12" OC on interior studs.

wall_4x8_2x6_24oc.notes: 4 studs (2 end + 2 interior at 24" OC), 2 plates, 1 OSB sheet.

wall_3x8.5_2x6_16oc.notes: 4 studs (2 end + 2 interior at 16" OC), 2 plates, 1 OSB sheet (trimmed to 3' width).

iwall_4x8_2x4_16oc.notes: Interior wall. 5 studs (2 end + 3 interior at 16" OC), 2 plates, no OSB.

iwall_4x8_2x4_24oc.notes: Interior wall. 4 studs (2 end + 2 interior at 24" OC), 2 plates, no OSB.

iwall_3x8.5_2x4_single.notes: Interior wall. 3 studs (2 end + 1 center), 2 plates, no OSB.

window_4x8_2x6_36x48.notes: Exterior window aperture, 36x48 RO, sill 24". Stud count is a full-stud-equivalent estimate: 2 kings + 2 jacks + cripples + sill, plus a doubled 2x8 header (cut from stud stock). 2 plates, 1 OSB sheet (opening cut on install).

door_4x8_2x6_38x83.notes: Exterior door aperture, 38x83 RO to floor. Stud-equivalent estimate: 2 kings + 2 jacks + cripples, doubled 2x8 header. Bottom plate cut out at the opening. 1 OSB sheet (opening cut on install).

idoor_4x8_2x4_38x83.notes: Interior door aperture, 38x83 RO (matches Seh2 8ft interior door). 2 kings + 2 jacks + cripples + single 2x4 header (non-bearing). Bottom plate cut out at the opening. No OSB.
